title: Cube Sum FAIL: demonstrates wrong cube_sum and a wrong uniqueness solution set
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants two independent, deterministically detectable violations: (1) the fundamental (2,1) witness declares cube_sum=217 instead of the correct 3^3+4^3+5^3=216, which is also then wrongly marked is_perfect_cube=true (217 is not a perfect cube); (2) uniqueness_check.solutions declares [4, 7] instead of the correct [4] for k in [1,1000] (k=7 gives (6^3+7^3+8^3)=216+343+512=1071, not a perfect cube).

uniqueness_check.claim: deliberately wrong: k=4 and k=7 both claimed in [1,1000]

witnesses.check: deliberately wrong: cube_sum should be 3³+4³+5³=216, not 217; 217 is not a perfect cube either

fail_ledger.message: declared solutions=[4,7] for k in [1,1000], but k=7 gives 1071, not a perfect cube -- only k=4 is a genuine solution
